summary: Iteration 16 testing complete for ePaper redesign. All features verified: (1) Backend returns max 2 pages with 12 articles each, (2) ePaper renders vertically with only 4px gap between pages, (3) Page counter shows 1/2 format, (4) AM/PM toggle works, (5) Compact archive bar at bottom with horizontal scrollable date buttons, (6) Mobile view (390px) has no side cropping, (7) PDF download works, (8) Article modal swipe/double-tap still working. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified.

passed_tests: GET /api/epaper/editions returns editions with morning/evening slots
ePaper returns edition_title with slot info
PDF download returns valid PDF file
Page counter shows '1/2' format in toolbar
Compact archive bar at bottom with 'Editions:' label
Archive bar has 28 horizontally scrollable date buttons
Mobile view (390px) has no horizontal scroll - content fits
Article modal next button advances to next article
Article modal double-tap shows heart animation

critical_code_review_comments: Backend epaper.py correctly limits to 2 pages with MAX_PER_PAGE=12
EpaperPage.jsx uses scroll-based navigation with IntersectionObserver
NewspaperPage.jsx has dense layout with row-based article arrangement
Archive bar uses flex with overflow-x-auto for horizontal scroll
Mobile responsive: px-2 sm:px-4 md:px-0 ensures proper padding
Article modal maintains all previous functionality (swipe, double-tap)

test_credentials.guest: No login required for news feed and ePaper

seed_data_creation: Used existing data - tested with 2026-03-05 and 2026-03-07 dates
context_for_next_testing_agent: ePaper redesign complete: 2-page format with 12 articles max per page. Pages render vertically with 4px gap. Compact archive bar at bottom with horizontal scrolling date buttons. Mobile view (390px) works without side cropping. All data-testids verified: epaper-page, data-page-index, epaper-slot-toggle, epaper-slot-morning, epaper-slot-evening, epaper-archive, epaper-date-picker, epaper-download-pdf, epaper-share, epaper-prev-page, epaper-next-page, article-modal, swipe-next-btn, swipe-prev-btn, article-doubletap-area, doubletap-heart, modal-save-btn, modal-share-btn, modal-close-btn.
